title: Uncraftables
description: This Pack Makes Uncraftable Things Craftable!!
body:
This Datapack adds tons of Custom Crafting Recipes and even changes some existing ones! You are now able to craft the uncraftable from Bedrock and Barriers to Horse Armor and Name Tags this Datapack Has it all! Look in Gallery for Recipies.

If you encounter any problems or bugs message me on discord [beyondtheend](https://discord.com/users/766257043648544779)
